THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMERSON, DOUG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 549A CASTRO ST, SF, CA $4,800.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,800.00, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
